title: Hearth tile style reference
notes: Light upper-left (55deg), selective dark outline #1b1410, soft drop shadow, 3/4 top-down, hue-shifted ramps, fps 10 on-twos.
_comment: The live Hearth reference set, used to generate godot/assets/tiles/v2/_style-reference.png. Paths resolve relative to THIS file (.claude/skills/style-reference/assets/). The hero exemplars are shipped tiles; the seasonal keyframes + idle frame strip show 'keyframes and animations' per the user's mental model. 'palette':'auto' quantizes the dominant colors out of these exemplars; the LOCKED ramps live in _style-spec.json palette.ramps[] (the spec's palette.source 'references/palette.gpl' is a provenance pointer, not a file on disk).
